name: In New York, how long do I have to file against an AI service for bad legal visibility?
description: 3-6 years from discovery in NY—act fast.[1]

acceptedAnswer.text: 3-6 years from discovery in NY—act fast.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: 3 years for fraud/misrep from discovery; 6 for contract in NY.[1] AI-specific emerging.[4] Key factors: harm manifestation date; tolling for concealment; federal if interstate.[1] Check exact accrual; file conservatively; bar referral for free consult.[1] Don't delay proof collection.
